source_directive: review and update all documentation - note that we should be doing this automatically with an agent as part of the architect team for both bug and regular feature fixes. concretely: promote the Phase 8 documentation-currency gate from an orchestrator-performed step into a dedicated doc-updater agent (opus, bounded Write only to the documentation-currency inventory files - README, CHANGELOG, CODEBASE_MAP, ROUTE_MAP, DESIGN_MAP, INTEGRATION_MAP, CLAUDE.md). The agent reads the run's diff + the coverage map + the run ledger + the current state of every inventory doc, identifies every stale section, and edits it in place. The existing system-architect Documentation Currency Audit mode still independently audits its output (producer/checker discipline per v0.9.13). Wire this into BOTH the main architect-team-pipeline (Phase 8) AND the bug-fix-pipeline (Phase B8) so doc currency is automatic for both feature work and bug fixes. Sweep the documentation-currency skill to reference the new agent. Run the v0.9.23 ship through the same gate so any v0.9.22 doc-staleness gets caught in this same pass.
layer_summary: All requirements are layer:infra — a new markdown agent + skill body modifications + Python pytest tests + JSON manifests. The architect-team plugin has no frontend and no backend; therefore no Playwright user-flow criteria and no dev-API integration criteria are required for the plugin's own test suite. Pipeline-meta work only.
playwright_n_a_authorization: The architect-team plugin self-modification has no UI to test. The codebase is markdown skills + Python hooks/tests + JSON manifests. Playwright user-flow criteria are N/A for every requirement.
dev_api_n_a_authorization: The architect-team plugin has no backend API. Dev-API integration testing criteria are N/A for every requirement.

requirements.summary: A dedicated agent that performs the Phase 8 documentation-currency update step.
scenarios: model is opus; tools allowlist is Read/Glob/Grep/LS/Bash/Write/TodoWrite (Edit absent)
all six required body sections present
process documents five steps with stale-section schema fields

requirements.summary: documentation-currency skill names the new doc-updater agent.
acceptance_criteria: pytest wiring test asserts the references are present

requirements.summary: Both architect-team-pipeline (Phase 8) and bug-fix-pipeline (Phase B8) dispatch the doc-updater agent.
scenarios: bug-fix-pipeline Phase B8 dispatches doc-updater with the same flow

requirements.summary: Structural pytest coverage for the new agent + pipeline wiring.
acceptance_criteria: total passing-test count strictly greater than 824

requirements.summary: Documentation currency + release as v0.9.23 (with the doc-updater agent dogfood-running on its own release).
scenarios: README banner / version badge / tests badge / NEW IN header / timeline / inventory grid reflect v0.9.23
Documentation-currency audit at Phase 8 returns clean (dogfood: the new agent updates the docs for this release; the audit verifies)
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_readme_styling.py banner + badge + inventory tests pass at v0.9.23
